decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 42/3209 lines reworked (1.3%, 34/50). 0/32 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.6% (12/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 59. Session 11: 41 (process:30 efficiency:9 ttfw:2). Session 12: 44 (process:30 efficiency:12 ttfw:2).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 251/251 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
